title: WorkflowModuleInvocation
description: One instantiated use of a reusable workflow module inside a concrete workflow-goal sample.

invocation_id.description: Unique invocation identifier within a workflow-goal sample.

module_id.description: Workflow module ID from the core module library.

binding_task_id.description: Optional atomic task binding selected for this invocation.

binding_id.description: Optional binding template ID selected for this invocation.

parameter_values.description: Concrete parameter values chosen for this invocation.

description.description: Instantiated natural-language description shown in the current workflow sample.

expected_observables.description: Concrete observable success signals for this invocation.

instantiated_effects.description: Optional concrete effects derived from parameter values.

instantiated_constraints.description: Optional concrete cost/risk overrides after parameter instantiation.
